TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Darrel Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1923, byacing te 3 ru 14 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 79 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1948 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Baltimore Bullets. pincyogan na qnxan 2003 kawas, Darrel Brown maki 世錦賽 na 100 米 pspung wal magal te sazing, Kim Collins wal magal te qutux. maki 四分之一 pspung wal magal cinbwanan 少年 slaquh psapung. 2003 kawas maki Pan American Games wal magal 接力 te sazing . Central American ru Caribbean Caribbean wal magal te qutux. 2005 kawas 6 byacing, Brown wal magal blaq balay sqabu. 2005 kawas maki 世錦賽, Brown 10.16秒 mhtaw pspung la.suruw lga,maki 接力pspung wal nya slaquh kwara qalang 38.10秒, Trinidad ru Tobago wal magal te sazing. suruw lga maki 2005 kawas cinbwanan 田徑 pspung,Brown wal magal te payat. maki 2009 kawas Berlin 世錦賽, Brown sangka Trinidad ru Tobago 4x100 米 接力 pspung, suruw (後者 Tobago) ga kwara qalang wal nya slaquh 37.62 秒 magal te sazing. Brown ga T.T.O. 隊 te qutux 站, Jamaica's trang wal magal te qutux 37.31 秒. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *arrel βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa ʦ~ʨali*ornia, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu βaltimore βullets~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan na qnxan **** kawas~ɕ, *arrel βrown maki *** na *** * ps~ɕpuŋ wal maɣal te s~ɕaziŋ, kim ʦ~ʨollins~ɕ wal maɣal te qutux. maki **** ps~ɕpuŋ wal maɣal ʦ~ʨinβwanan ** s~ɕlaquħ ps~ɕapuŋ. **** kawas~ɕ maki pan ameriʦ~ʨan ɣames~ɕ wal maɣal ** te s~ɕaziŋ . ʦ~ʨentral ameriʦ~ʨan ru ʦ~ʨariββean ʦ~ʨariββean wal maɣal te qutux. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, βrown wal maɣal βlaq βalaj s~ɕqaβu. **** kawas~ɕ maki ***, βrown **.*** mħtaw ps~ɕpuŋ la.s~ɕuruw lɣa,maki **ps~ɕpuŋ wal nja s~ɕlaquħ kwara qalaŋ **.***, trini*a* ru toβaɣo wal maɣal te s~ɕaziŋ. s~ɕuruw lɣa maki **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨinβwanan ** ps~ɕpuŋ,βrown wal maɣal te pajat. maki **** kawas~ɕ βerlin ***, βrown s~ɕaŋka trini*a* ru toβaɣo *x*** * ** ps~ɕpuŋ, s~ɕuruw (** toβaɣo) ɣa kwara qalaŋ wal nja s~ɕlaquħ **.** * maɣal te s~ɕaziŋ. βrown ɣa t.t.o. * te qutux *, *amaiʦ~ʨaʔs~ɕ traŋ wal maɣal te qutux **.** *. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Darrel Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1923, byacing te 3 ru 14 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 79 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1948 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Baltimore Bullets. pincyogan na qnxan 2003 kawas, Darrel Brown maki 世錦賽 na 100 米 pspung wal magal te sazing, Kim Collins wal magal te qutux. maki 四分之一 pspung wal magal cinbwanan 少年 slaquh psapung. 2003 kawas maki Pan American Games wal magal 接力 te sazing . Central American ru Caribbean Caribbean wal magal te qutux. 2005 kawas 6 byacing, Brown wal magal blaq balay sqabu. 2005 kawas maki 世錦賽, Brown 10.16秒 mhtaw pspung la.suruw lga,maki 接力pspung wal nya slaquh kwara qalang 38.10秒, Trinidad ru Tobago wal magal te sazing. suruw lga maki 2005 kawas cinbwanan 田徑 pspung,Brown wal magal te payat. maki 2009 kawas Berlin 世錦賽, Brown sangka Trinidad ru Tobago 4x100 米 接力 pspung, suruw (後者 Tobago) ga kwara qalang wal nya slaquh 37.62 秒 magal te sazing. Brown ga T.T.O. 隊 te qutux 站, Jamaica's trang wal magal te qutux 37.31 秒. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *arrel βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa ʦ~ʨali*ornia, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu βaltimore βullets~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan na qnxan **** kawas~ɕ, *arrel βrown maki *** na *** * ps~ɕpuŋ wal maɣal te s~ɕaziŋ, kim ʦ~ʨollins~ɕ wal maɣal te qutux. maki **** ps~ɕpuŋ wal maɣal ʦ~ʨinβwanan ** s~ɕlaquħ ps~ɕapuŋ. **** kawas~ɕ maki pan ameriʦ~ʨan ɣames~ɕ wal maɣal ** te s~ɕaziŋ . ʦ~ʨentral ameriʦ~ʨan ru ʦ~ʨariββean ʦ~ʨariββean wal maɣal te qutux. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, βrown wal maɣal βlaq βalaj s~ɕqaβu. **** kawas~ɕ maki ***, βrown **.*** mħtaw ps~ɕpuŋ la.s~ɕuruw lɣa,maki **ps~ɕpuŋ wal nja s~ɕlaquħ kwara qalaŋ **.***, trini*a* ru toβaɣo wal maɣal te s~ɕaziŋ. s~ɕuruw lɣa maki **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨinβwanan ** ps~ɕpuŋ,βrown wal maɣal te pajat. maki **** kawas~ɕ βerlin ***, βrown s~ɕaŋka trini*a* ru toβaɣo *x*** * ** ps~ɕpuŋ, s~ɕuruw (** toβaɣo) ɣa kwara qalaŋ wal nja s~ɕlaquħ **.** * maɣal te s~ɕaziŋ. βrown ɣa t.t.o. * te qutux *, *amaiʦ~ʨaʔs~ɕ traŋ wal maɣal te qutux **.** *. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
